article_title: Bylaw 14751 — Housing Agreement (5860 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in 47 below-market rental units at 5860 Olive Avenue under new housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14751 on June 24, 2025, authorizing a legally binding housing agreement with Polygon Onyx Homes Ltd. for a 34-storey tower at 5860 Olive Avenue. The agreement requires 47 of the building's rental units to be rented at below-market rates (cheaper than typical market rents) to eligible lower-income households, with rent limits tied to CMHC rental data and BC Housing income guidelines.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review how this agreement's rent and tenant eligibility rules may apply to your units.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
